question: Based on the stacked area chart showing quarterly store operations indicators, which quarter has the best overall performance?

options.A: Q2 has the best performance with the highest combined total of all indicators.
options.B: Overall performance cannot be determined accurately from this chart because it combines store metrics with different units.
options.C: Q1 has the best performance because it maintains stable values across all indicators.
options.D: Q1 has the best performance because it consistently has the lowest values for all indicators.

explanation: The chart stacks unrelated metrics (Revenue, Energy Usage, etc.) into a cumulative area. These metrics have different units and meanings, so adding them together creates a meaningless total. The stacked area cannot be used to assess overall performance. Only individual metric analysis is valid.
